questions.scenario: `orders-api-00042` has passed startup checks. The team wants to expose it slowly. Which Cloud Run concept handles that?
questions.explanation: Cloud Run traffic settings decide how requests are split across revisions.

questions.scenario: Errors rise after 10 percent of traffic moves to a new revision. What is the fastest safe recovery shape?

options.text: Move traffic back to the previous healthy revision while investigating.

questions.explanation: Traffic rollback is a core Cloud Run recovery habit.

questions.scenario: Which review facts explain what users are seeing?

options.text: Whether the failing revision has startup or request errors.
The number of unused DNS labels.

questions.explanation: User behavior follows the active traffic split and the health of the revisions receiving traffic.
